pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly check for this exact dashboard name.
Task description mandates 'Add at least 3 visualization panels to this dashboard' and export_result.sh extracts the panel count.
Task description explicitly mandates SPL queries to include these exact fields ('_indextime', 'punct', 'len' or 'linecount').
task_utils.sh and install_splunk.sh configure and use the 'admin' user.
task_utils.sh and install_splunk.sh configure and use the 'SplunkAdmin1!' password.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world log data downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub (auth.log, syslog, Apache error logs, SSH logs). The setup scripts confirm that the dashboard must be named exactly 'Data_Quality_Audit' with at least 3 panels incorporating specific Splunk fields ('_indextime', 'punct', 'len|linecount') as specified in the task instructions and evaluation scripts. The Splunk environment is consistently configured with 'admin' and 'SplunkAdmin1!' credentials.
